caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, suspenders, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a distinctive, tall, grey, pointed hairpiece that resembles a stylized crest. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him, and the background consists of a wall covered in small, framed photographs. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expressions change; he is seen speaking with his mouth open in some moments and closing it in others. The background and equipment remain static as the man focuses his gaze slightly forward while talking.
